purpose: Broader paid validation for the bounded hybrid branch using a frozen comparable 20-question set.
budget_tier_policy: Use the benchmark harness defaults and graded per-question budget policy already implemented in Core2; do not override question-specific budget behavior during this phase.
stop_rules: Do not widen the hybrid seam during validation.
Do not change question set after the run starts.
Do not treat retrieval-looking gains as end-to-end success without meeting the locked verdict thresholds.
Derive the final human-readable verdict from the canonical 04.11-STATUS.json file.
notes: This phase measures the bounded hybrid branch; it does not authorize new implementation work.
This manifest is the frozen run contract for 04.11.
